title: parosela diffusa
intro: Parosela diffusa, also known as the Mexican tea or yerba de gato, is a plant native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, Parosela diffusa has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Parosela diffusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
